# USDT Stake
> An independent, non-custodial dashboard for understanding and comparing ways to earn yield with Tether USD₮ without treating USDT as a native staking asset.

## What is USDT Stake
USDT Stake describes yield strategies that use USDT, usually through lending markets, liquidity pools, vaults, exchange programs, or protocol safety modules. USDT does not provide proof-of-stake validator rewards because it is a fiat-referenced token issued on other blockchains, not a blockchain’s consensus asset. Returns come from borrowers, trading fees, token incentives, or other protocol-defined economics. An informational dashboard compares these routes without holding funds, while custodial “Earn” products transfer control to an exchange or service provider.

## How it works
1. Select the blockchain carrying your USDT and confirm its official token contract.
2. Compare the destination protocol’s rate model, liquidity, lock or cooldown rules, fees, audits, and withdrawal conditions.
3. Open the protocol, connect a self-custody wallet, and review every requested contract address and permission.
4. Approve a limited USDT allowance, then sign a separate supply, deposit, or stake transaction when required.
5. The protocol records a position or issues a receipt token; yield accrues under its rules until withdrawal, subject to available liquidity and any cooldown.

## Key facts
- USDT has no native staking mechanism and does not secure a proof-of-stake network.
- Tether issues USDT on multiple independent blockchains; balances are not automatically interchangeable across networks.
- Ethereum Mainnet uses chain ID `1`; official USDT contract: `0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7`.
- TRON USDT is TRC-20 contract `TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t`.
- Solana USDT uses mint `Es9vMFrzaCERmJfrF4H2FYD4KCoNkY11McCe8BenwNYB`.
- Ethereum USDT follows an older ERC-20 implementation whose transfer function does not return a Boolean value.
- Network fees use the chain’s native resource or asset, not necessarily USDT.
- Non-custodial means the user signs transactions; deposited assets can still be controlled by protocol smart contracts.
- Tether retains issuer-level freezing and blacklisting powers under its terms.

## Common questions
- **Is staking USDT safe?** No route is inherently safe; assess smart-contract, issuer, liquidity, approval, and counterparty risks.
- **Who controls my funds?** The dashboard holds nothing; your wallet controls signatures, while deposited USDT follows the destination contract’s rules.
- **What fees apply?** Expect network fees and possibly protocol, performance, withdrawal, swap, or bridge costs.
- **How long does it take?** Deposits follow network confirmation; withdrawals may also depend on liquidity, cooldowns, or fixed terms.
- **Which assets and chains are supported?** Only USDT deployments and protocol markets explicitly shown by current official sources should be used.
- **How do I start?** Fund a compatible wallet with official USDT and the chain’s fee asset, then verify the protocol before approving.
- **What are the main risks?** Contract exploits, malicious approvals, depegging, issuer freezes, illiquidity, bridges, changing rates, and custodial failure.

## App
- Dashboard: https://usdt-stake.github.io/
- App: https://usdt-stake.github.io/dashboard/

## Official resources
USDT Stake Dashboard: https://usdt-stake.github.io/

Tether Supported Protocols: https://tether.to/en/supported-protocols/
Tether Transparency: https://tether.to/en/transparency/?tab=usdt
Tether Legal Terms: https://tether.to/en/legal/
Aave Supplying Documentation: https://aave.com/help/supplying
Aave Umbrella Documentation: https://aave.com/help/umbrella/umbrella
Compound III Documentation: https://docs.compound.finance/
MetaMask Token Approval Guide: https://support.metamask.io/more-web3/learn/how-to-revoke-smart-contract-allowances-token-approvals/

TRON USDT Explorer: https://tronscan.org/contract/TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t/analysis
Solana USDT Explorer: https://explorer.solana.com/address/Es9vMFrzaCERmJfrF4H2FYD4KCoNkY11McCe8BenwNYB
